thread.title_full: Haryana Gears Up for Spectacular Maharishi Valmiki Jayanti Celebration at Jind | Chandigarh News - Times of India

author: Times Of India
title: Haryana Gears Up for Spectacular Maharishi Valmiki Jayanti Celebration at Jind | Chandigarh News - Times of India
text: Jind: To take stock of preparations for state-level Maharishi Valmiki Jayanti celebrations to be held at Eklavya stadium in Jind on Sunday, Haryana minister of social justice and empowerment Krishna Kumar Bedi, and public works minister Ranbir Gangwa, visited the venue on Saturday.The ministers instructed officials to ensure no stone is left unturned in making the event a success. Haryana chief minister Nayab Singh Saini would be the chief guest at the event. Several state ministers, MLAs, and thousands of people are expected to attend the event.Bedi directed officials to create separate blocks for men and women at the venue. He stressed on the need for sufficient drinking water, temporary toilets, electricity, cleanliness, flower decorations on the main stage, parking of vehicles, security arrangements, and other amenities at the venue. He added that under the Sant Mahapurush Samman and Vichar-Prasar Yojana, the state govt has decided to celebrate the birth anniversaries of all saints and great personalities, spreading their teachings.Gangwa said Valmiki’s message had inspired many towards humanity, instilling self-confidence in individuals. Deputy commissioner Mohammad Imran Raza said all preparations for the event had been done. We also published the following articles recentlyState-level Maharishi Valmiki Jayanti celebrations: Ministers visit venue to review preperationHaryana is gearing up for a grand state-level Maharishi Valmiki Jayanti celebration at the Eklavya stadium in Jind on Sunday. Chief Minister Nayab Singh Saini will lead the event, joined by state ministers and thousands of devotees. Organizers are pulling out all the stops to ensure a spectacular event, with meticulous arrangements for seating, amenities, security, and cultural performances.115606967Haryana Government to Revamp State-Run Schools Over Next Five Years: State Education MinisterHaryana's School Education Minister, Mahipal Dhanda, has announced a five-year plan to completely overhaul state-run schools. Dhanda emphasized the government's commitment to improving rural education and equipping students with skills for national development. He urged villagers to enroll their children in government schools, promising positive outcomes and highlighting the government's focus on education to secure a brighter future.115403670Detailed Mys development plan will be prepared: MinisterMysuru's District Minister, HC Mahadevappa, has revealed plans for a comprehensive development strategy encompassing both the city and the district. The initiative aims to transform Mysuru into a thriving hub, incorporating suggestions from experts and residents. Key areas of focus include expanding the city's corporation limits, enhancing infrastructure, and promoting economic and educational growth.115607137
